title: Kane (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kane''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Kane]]''', a [[Nikto]] racer
*[[Kane (Path of the Closed Fist)|'''Kane''']], a [[weequay]] [[Path of the Closed Fist]] member
*[[Kane (Space Wars)|'''Kane''']], a fictional character from the [[holodrama]] ''[[Space Wars]]''
*'''[[Elia Kane]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[officer]]
*'''[[Tracene Kane]]''', a [[journalist]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Kane Ezruud]]''', a criminal
*'''[[Kane Griggs]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]
*'''[[Kane Mihal]]''', a criminal
*'''[[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Kane a bar]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] insult

===''[[The Star Wars]]''===
*'''[[Kane Starkiller]]''', the father of [[Annikin Starkiller]].

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''[[Gil Kane]]''', a comic-book artist.
*'''[[Patrick O'Kane]]''', an actor who potrayed [[Tritt Opan]].
*'''[[Tom Kane]]''', a ''[[Star Wars]]'' voice actor.
*'''[[Valene Kane]]''', an actress who potrayed [[Lyra Erso]].

{{Disambig}}
